liked.title: Non-bleed paper
liked.sub: Markers, gel pens, crayons all work

liked.title: Activities + coloring
liked.sub: She engages, not just colors an outline

caveat_body: Thirty pages goes fast for an avid colorer — some kids finish in an afternoon. Best as a gift or special quiet-time book, not an everyday all-year activity.
caveat_sub: Best for: girls ages 4–10 · gifts · Easter · First Communion
